response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong geospatial domain knowledge as the founder of GISCollective and has proven experience building high-throughput, low-latency microservices. Although his recent roles focus heavily on TypeScript and Node.js rather than the required C++ or Rust, his deep expertise in DLang and past C++ experience demonstrate the necessary systems programming aptitude to excel in this routing data pipeline role.
strengths: Deep domain expertise in geospatial data platforms and GIS applications.
Proven experience designing low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems.
Strong software craftsmanship mindset with extensive experience in TDD and automated testing.
concerns: Recent professional experience is heavily focused on TypeScript and Node.js rather than C++ or Rust.
Professional C/C++ experience is somewhat dated, primarily from 2014-2015.
Lacks explicit mention of experience with routing algorithms or map tiling pipelines.
